summary: Capture failures and corrections to improve future task execution quality.
Turn reactive task execution into proactive planning, follow-through, and continuous improvement.
Combine self-reflection, long-term learning, and proactive behavior in a single agent workflow.
Build and query structured knowledge graphs for reusable task memory.
Store and retrieve project patterns, decisions, and context for knowledge-rich agent workflows.
Set up persistent memory search and fix weak recall in existing agents.
Generate and edit images for creative and product content workflows.
Transcribe audio and normalize transcripts for downstream automation.
Run AI-optimized web research with structured results and source-friendly summaries.
